allow: PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { python -m py_compile core.py calibrate.py sniper.py; if \($?\) { "OK: 三个文件语法通过" } } else { "未检测到 python，跳过语法检查（你装好 Python 后再跑即可）" })
PowerShell(python -m py_compile core.py human_input.py calibrate.py sniper.py; if \($?\) { "OK: 四个文件语法全部通过" })

PowerShell(python -c "import human_input as h; print\('cursor=', h.get_cursor\(\)\); print\('to_abs=', h._to_absolute\(100,100\)\); print\('vscreen=', h._virtual_screen\(\)\); print\('SendInput结构与坐标换算 OK，未移动鼠标'\)")
